nodes.name: Drag-to-Reorder Skill
nodes.description: Drag-to-reorder patterns using @dnd-kit covering desktop and mobile touch, variable-width stretch fix, multi-row wrapping strategy

nodes.name: CSS.Translate Over Transform
nodes.description: Use CSS.Translate.toString(transform) instead of CSS.Transform.toString to avoid stretch-to-slot-width bug in variable-width drag items

nodes.name: Sorting Strategy by Layout
nodes.description: rectSortingStrategy for wrapping multi-row layouts, horizontalListSortingStrategy for single row, verticalListSortingStrategy for single column

nodes.name: MouseSensor + TouchSensor Split
nodes.description: Separate MouseSensor(distance:8) for desktop and TouchSensor(delay:200,tolerance:6) for mobile long-press, avoiding single PointerSensor pitfalls

nodes.name: touch-action: none Requirement
nodes.description: Tailwind touch-none on draggable elements prevents browser from hijacking touch gesture for scrolling

nodes.name: Reordering on onDragEnd Only
nodes.description: Reorder once in onDragEnd with stable IDs and arrayMove; avoid live-reorder in onDragOver to prevent oscillation and Maximum update depth exceeded errors

nodes.name: Drag-to-Reorder Reference Implementations
nodes.description: DraftPresetChips.tsx (variable-width wrapping chips) and sortable-tabs-strip.tsx (single-row scrollable tabs)

nodes.name: @dnd-kit Library
nodes.description: @dnd-kit/core, @dnd-kit/sortable, @dnd-kit/utilities for drag-to-reorder functionality in OpenChamber UI
